title: manifest.jsonl — Q/A record
description: One parliamentary question record (kind=qa) from manifest.jsonl. Comes in two shapes depending on house.

key.description: Stable dedup key: LS|{S|U}|{qno}|{date} or RS|{S|U}|{qno}|{date}

date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string

qtype.description: Question type, as spelled by the source (RS API: upper case; LS eLibrary: title case)

asker_entity_ids.description: Parallel to askers; null when not resolved

mp_code.description: Stable member code (REQ-0028 member-ID retrieval). RS: mp_code echoed by the rsdoc API row (code-pinned). LS portal: the requested roster mpCode (roster-resolved exact-name join). Absent on topic/name-mode records.

found_via_group.description: Topic search_group that found this record (LS only)

qslno.description: RS serial question number, as typed by the source (RS only; live API returns integers)

question_text.description: Full question text from RS API (RS only)

answer_text.description: Full answer text from RS API (RS only)

pdf_url_hindi.description: Hindi PDF URL (RS API and LS sansad.in portal records)

status.description: Raw question status from RS API (RS only)
